title: App workflow not triggering on Supabase database changes
symptom: The app workflow fails to trigger despite successful INSERTs being logged in Supabase. Users see no updates in the chat window.
not_this_if: App workflow triggers for other channels
No INSERTs are logged in Supabase
root_cause: The app workflow is not correctly subscribed to the channel that matches the table name. If the channel name does not match the table name, the workflow will not receive updates.
fix_steps: Change the channel name from 'room1' to 'messages'
Ensure the app workflow is set to listen to the correct channel
Test the workflow to confirm it triggers on new messages
agent_instruction: Update the channel name in your subscription to match the table name 'messages'.
